what: Extract YAML frontmatter from each markdown file
why: Frontmatter contains metadata (title, tags, category) needed for indexing and search
output: Array of parsed entries with frontmatter fields and file paths

success_handling.criteria: All markdown files are parsed and frontmatter is extracted from each

event.message: Frontmatter parsed from all vault files

error_handling.criteria: YAML parsing fails for one or more files
error_handling.action: Skip invalid files, log warning with file paths, continue with valid entries

decisions.outcome: Proceed with valid entries, report invalid files
